task.title: Creating a custom build process
task.shortdesc: You can use the extensible error feedback mechanism to create a custom build process. This mechanism allows for linking multiple preprocessors by capturing the feedback from one preprocessor for use as an input to another.

taskbody.prereq: Read about the . This mechanism allows for capturing error feedback from a program and display it in the Remote Error List. It is also the mechanism that allows for linking multiple preprocessors.

steps.stepsection: To set up a custom build process that involves multiple preprocessors:

cmd.xref: Set up the client for error feedback.

step.cmd: Link multiple preprocessors by using the Local Preprocessors property page.
